agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Agents 1 and 2 concluded that bullet fragments indicate firing distance through presence of unburnt material and metallic debris, particularly evident in close-range shootings under 30 cm. These findings align with documented ballistic principles where such residues appear near wounds caused by short-range gunfire but disappear at greater distances.  

\boxed{C}
